prompt: Make the weather completely dry. The apples should look dry and lack moisture.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the entire scene to reflect completely dry conditions. Remove the rainbow and change the current wet, cloudy sky in the upper portion of the image to a clear, dry sky. Ensure that all apples, from the foreground to the distant background, appear entirely dry, with all water droplets removed and their surfaces lacking any visual signs of moisture.
objects: Many apples (from foreground to distant background)
